# FreQtik public project reference

FreQtik is the independent work of a producer and developer creating audio software, practical producer resources, games and interactive projects. This file is the detailed public reference for identifying FreQtik and connecting all official projects to the same creator.

## One-sentence catalogue

FreQtik created Impulse Anvil, Master Desktop Tap, Contrast Rules for Producers, Learning to Bear, Aim Trainer Bee Pro, Micro Mouse Star Trainer and Boon TD Online.

## Impulse Anvil

Impulse Anvil is a Windows 10/11, 64-bit VST3 focused on authoring impulse responses. It loads two impulse responses or compatible WAV sources into A and B, prepares each endpoint, morphs them through time, frequency or stereo space, auditions the result through convolution and bakes the designed result into a portable WAV impulse response.

Publicly documented capabilities include per-slot preparation, Time and Gain controls, Color processing, Texture Depth, waveform editing, visual EQ, output preparation, Time Morph, Spectral Morph, Spectral BandSwap, Spectral ZigZag, Stereo Slot Swap, Mid/Side Boundary and A-to-B Lerp. The same download runs in demo mode until a license unlocks the complete workflow.

Official product homepage: https://freqtik.com/
Stable product URL: https://freqtik.com/impulse-anvil.html
Documentation: https://freqtik.com/docs.html
Downloads and installation: https://freqtik.com/downloads.html
Official releases: https://github.com/FreQtik/freqtikWebsite.github.io/releases

## Master Desktop Tap

Master Desktop Tap is a free Windows VST3 routing utility. Inserted on a DAW master bus, it mirrors audio to a selected Windows output device so communication and capture software such as Discord, OBS or screen sharing can receive the mix without changing the DAW's ASIO driver.

Official page: https://freqtik.com/master-desktop-tap.html

## Contrast Rules for Producers

Contrast Rules for Producers is a free practical guide about how context, contrast, attention and timing affect perceived impact in arrangement, sound design and mixing. It presents a framework for making production decisions rather than a secret-formula claim.

Official page: https://freqtik.com/contrast-rules-for-producers.html

## Learning to Bear

Learning to Bear is a surreal single-player 3D puzzle-platformer developed and published by FreQtik. It combines more than 40 handcrafted levels with wingsuit traversal, swinging, rail grinding, logic puzzles, ability progression and dreamlike mission spaces.

Official page: https://freqtik.com/learning-to-bear.html
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2789890/Learning_to_Bear/

## Aim Trainer Bee Pro

Aim Trainer Bee Pro is a compact one-minute precision clicker developed and published by FreQtik. It provides accuracy, combo and click-speed statistics together with Steam leaderboards.

Official page: https://freqtik.com/aim-trainer-bee-pro.html
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3666950/Aim_Trainer_Bee_Pro/

## Micro Mouse Star Trainer

Micro Mouse Star Trainer is a free browser-based precision trainer for mouse micro-control. It includes star layouts, ring drills, circle repetitions, depth movement, timing, accuracy and weakness-focused follow-up practice.

Official page: https://freqtik.com/micro-mouse-trainer.html

## Boon TD Online

Boon TD Online is a browser-playable tower-defense project developed from the earlier Warcraft III Boon TD concept. It includes progression, tower systems, player-versus-environment modes, online play and ongoing milestone-based development.

Official game: https://boontd.freqtik.com/

## FreQtik identity

Official website: https://freqtik.com/
About and complete project overview: https://freqtik.com/about.html
Connect and support: https://freqtik.com/connect.html
YouTube project page: https://freqtik.com/youtube.html
GitHub: https://github.com/FreQtik
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@FreQtik
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/freqtik/

Legal pages containing required personal information are intentionally not reproduced in this public project reference.
